recommendations.title: Alien Outpost
recommendations.overview: A documentary crew follows an elite unit of soldiers in the wake of an alien invasion.

recommendations.title: Occupation
recommendations.overview: Town residents must band together after a devastating alien invasion. As they struggle to survive, they realize they must stay one step ahead of their attackers and work together for a chance to strike back.

recommendations.title: War of the Worlds: The Attack
recommendations.overview: Three young astronomers fight to survive a deadly Martian invasion.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Revolt
recommendations.overview: The story of humankind's last stand against a cataclysmic alien invasion. Set in the war-ravaged African countryside, a U.S. soldier and a French foreign aid worker team up to survive the alien onslaught. Their bond will be tested as they search for

recommendations.title: Attack the Block
recommendations.overview: A teen gang in a South London housing estate must team up with the other residents to protect their neighbourhood from a terrifying alien invasion.

recommendations.title: Returner
recommendations.overview: A young woman from the future forces a local gunman to help her stop an impending alien invasion which will wipe out the human race.

recommendations.title: Occupation: Rainfall
recommendations.overview: Two years into an intergalactic invasion of Earth, survivors in Sydney, Australia, fight back in a desperate ground war. As casualties mount by the day, the resistance and their unexpected allies, uncover a plot that could see the war come to a decis

recommendations.title: Arco
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: 10-year-old Arco lives in a far future. During his first flight in his rainbow suit, he loses control and falls into the past. Iris, a girl his age from 2075, comes to his rescue and tries by all means to help send him back to his era.

recommendations.title: Origin: Spirits of the Past
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Romance, Action
